news.headline: Rocket Lab stock (NASDAQ: RKLB) is gaining premarket due to a new Electron launch named 'Changes In Latitudes, Changes In Attitudes' set for October 19, 2024, making it the company's fastest launch - all part of their on-demand launch capabilities. This will be their 12th mission in 2024, doubling their Electron launch rate.
news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (NASDAQ: RKLB) has seen an increase in premarket trading as they announced a last-minute Electron launch named 'Changes In Latitudes, Changes In Attitudes.' This commercial mission is scheduled to take off from Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1 on October 19, 2024, for a confidential customer. Remarkably, this launch will mark the fastest turnaround for the company, completing the mission in under two months from contract signing. Rocket Lab's efficient call-up launch capability, streamlined Electron rocket production, and responsive launch sites allow for on-demand launches within days. This will be Rocket Lab's 12th mission of 2024, highlighting their increased launch rate. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dutch company Tagologic wins AIM Allan Gillian Award 2024 for smart tagging innovation in digital data management.
news.summary: In The Hague, Netherlands, on October 17, 2024, Tagologic, a local company, received the prestigious Allan Gilligan Award for 2024 from AIM Global. This award highlights Tagologic's exceptional work in digital tagging and data management. With this recognition, Tagologic is acknowledged for its innovative approach in these areas.

news.headline: VerticalScope Holdings to release Q3 2024 financial results on November 12, 2024. Conference call on Nov 13 at 8:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Toronto, VerticalScope Holdings Inc. ("VerticalScope" or the “Company”) (TSX: FORA; OTCQX: VFORF) has announced that its third-quarter financial results for 2024 will be disclosed after the market closes on Tuesday, November 12, 2024. To delve into the Company's financial performance, management will conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET on Wednesday, November 13, 2024. To join the live call, registration is required at the following web address: https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/861368726.

news.headline: Musk’s Empire risks being targeted by the EU for potential X fines - Sources
Landsvirkjun ends rating from Moody's, sticks with S&P Global Ratings following expert review.
news.summary: Landsvirkjun has chosen to use the services of just one international credit rating agency, S&P Global Ratings, and has ended its contract with Moody's. This choice comes after a comprehensive assessment of Landsvirkjun's credit rating needs. Working with a group of global consultants, the evaluation showed that having a sole credit rating agency would meet the company's requirements.

news.headline: Google restores Bitcoin and Ethereum price charts after temporarily removing them due to "inaccurate data."
news.summary: The tech company clarified that it had taken down several cryptocurrency price charts temporarily because of "inaccurate information."

news.headline: 2024 China Intl College Students' Innovation Competition Grand Final held in Shanghai from Oct 12-15. Organized by 12 departments.
news.summary: Shanghai, October 17, 2024 - The Grand Final of the 2024 China International College Students' Innovation Competition took place in Shanghai from October 12 to 15. This event was a collaboration between 12 departments and attracted participants from across the country. The competition showcased the talents of college students, with a focus on innovation and creativity. It served as a platform for young minds to present their ideas and projects, highlighting the importance of fostering future leaders.

news.headline: Eurozone inflation for September was lowered, bolstering ECB's decision to reduce rates.
Eurozone Trade Balance Actual 11B (Forecast -, Previous 16B)
Bitfinex hacker faces 5-year sentence for laundering $8B in stolen Bitcoin as per DOJ; sentencing expected in November.
news.summary: The Department of Justice's sentencing recommendations set the stage for the judge's final decision. The duo is set to be sentenced in November.

news.headline: Medigene unveils UniTope & TraCR, a detection system for 3S rTCRs, at ASGCT 2024 in Philadelphia for cancer treatment.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Planegg/Martinsried, Medigene AG (FSE: MDG1, Prime Standard) unveiled a cutting-edge universal detection system at the American Society of Gene & Cell Therapy conference in Philadelphia, PA. The system, named UniTope & TraCR, is designed for the identification of specific, sensitive, and safe recombinant T cell receptors (rTCRs) for cancer treatment. As an oncology platform company, Medigene specializes in developing TCR-guided therapies. The event, held on October 16-17, showcased Medigene's innovative approach to advancing cancer treatment through groundbreaking technology.

news.headline: UK ministers have written formal letters to Starmer protesting against spending cuts.
Kexing Biopharm introduced Apexelsin® at CPHI Milan 2024 for EU market. Successful launch at the convention on Oct 10.
news.summary: The 2024 International Convention on Pharmaceutical Ingredients and Intermediates Europe Exhibition (CPHI Milan 2024), a major event in the pharmaceutical industry, wrapped up successfully on October 10th in Shenzhen, China. This exhibition is known as one of the largest and most important gatherings in the sector worldwide.

news.headline: M&T Bank Corp. (NYSE: MTB) reports $721 million net income in 3Q24, with diluted earnings per share at $4.02.
news.summary: M&T Bank Corporation reported a quarterly net income of $721 million, with diluted earnings per common share at $4.02. The company's total assets were $209.58 billion, with net interest income at $1.73 billion. Noninterest income was $606 million, noninterest expense stood at $1.3 billion, and provision for credit losses was $120 million. The return on average assets was 1.37%, and the return on average common shareholders' equity was 10.26%. M&T's capital rose to an estimated CET1 capital ratio of 11.54%. The bank repurchased $200 million in common stock in Q3 2024. The net interest margin widened to 3.62%, and average loans and leases grew. Nonaccrual loans decreased, and the provision for credit losses declined from the previous quarter. Chief Financial Officer Daryl N. Bible highlighted positive momentum and strong capital position, expressing confidence for the year's end. Investors can participate in a conference call to discuss the financial results further. M&T Bank's parent company, headquartered in Buffalo, NY, serves in 12 eastern U.S. states. The article contains detailed financial data, governance insights, conference call details, and forward-looking statements, emphasizing capital ratios, income returns, and asset quality.

news.headline: DPC Dash, exclusive Domino's Pizza franchisee in China, announces key milestones & updates for shareholders.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Hong Kong, DPC Dash, known as Domino's Pizza China ("DPC Dash" or the "Company") (1405.HK), discussed its role as the exclusive master franchisee for Domino's Pizza in China Mainland, Hong Kong, and Macau.

news.headline: M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) reports Q3 2024 net income of $721 million, $4.02 diluted EPS. Net interest income key highlight.
news.summary: M&T Bank Corporation, based in Buffalo, New York, announced its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The company reported a quarterly net income of $721 million, resulting in $4.02 of diluted earnings per common share. This marked a notable increase from previous quarters. In terms of specific financial figures, net interest income reached a significant amount, underscoring the company's strong performance.

news.headline: Global market for hydrogen-powered heavy duty trucks to grow at 45% CAGR by 2033, driven by regulatory compliance - Guidehouse Insights.
news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado on October 17, 2024, a recent report from Guidehouse Insights highlights the importance of regulatory compliance as a key factor driving the adoption of zero emissions technology. The report delves into the market trends and revenue forecasts for medium duty and heavy duty trucks that utilize hydrogen internal combustion engines. This report underscores the increasing focus on environmentally-friendly solutions, indicating a growing shift towards sustainable transportation options. The numbers revealed in the report showcase the significant potential for growth in this sector, with projections pointing towards substantial revenue generation from hydrogen-powered trucks in the coming years.

news.headline: TSMC raises revenue outlook, showing confidence in AI growth.
South Korea's NIPA launches Korea IT Cooperation Centre UAE in Dubai at 6,500 sq.ft. hub, fostering global innovation.
news.summary: The Korea IT Cooperation Centre UAE has been established as NIPA's inaugural hub in the Middle East, marking a significant milestone. Launched during GITEX Global, the centre spans over 6,500 square feet at a prime location within the region's premier tech hub. The primary aim of this initiative is to facilitate meaningful connections and foster collaboration between Korean entrepreneurs and innovators in the Middle East. This development is set to enhance cooperation in the tech sector and drive mutual growth and success.

news.headline: Yellen warns wide tariffs could spark inflation. Critiques Trump's economic plans in speech.
news.summary: The Secretary of the Treasury is gearing up to challenge the economic proposals put forth by former President Donald J. Trump in an upcoming speech.

news.headline: Infinera may receive $93M in CHIPS Act funding, leading to over $200M in federal incentives for expanding semiconductor production.
news.summary: A proposed funding initiative, in conjunction with investment tax credits, has the potential to provide over $200 million in total federal incentives aimed at expanding the manufacturing and packaging of semiconductors. This endeavor is crucial in bolstering essential U.S. infrastructure and advancements in artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: Explore 6 global wellness retreats offering advanced treatments and activities for mind-body wellness and longevity.
news.summary: Luxury retreats globally are focused on promoting wellness and extending lifespan using cutting-edge tests and "biohacking" therapies in addition to practices like meditation and breath work. These retreats offer a comprehensive approach to well-being for individuals seeking to improve their health, with a growing number of people participating in these programs each year. The increasing popularity of all-inclusive retreats reflects a growing interest in holistic health and the use of technology to enhance well-being among individuals around the world.

news.headline: Cipher Neutron appoints Dr. Pierre Rivard to Board of Directors; effective October 16, 2024. Dr. Rivard champions cleaner, renewable energy.
news.summary: In Toronto, a Canadian company named Cipher Neutron Inc. (also known as CN) has recently appointed Dr. Pierre Rivard to its Board of Directors, with the appointment becoming effective as of October 16, 2024. Dr. Rivard, a prominent figure in the field of renewable energy, has been advocating for cleaner energy solutions for over 30 years. He has held various roles in the energy technology sector, including CEO, co-founder, chairman, board member, angel investor, and advisor. This move is anticipated to bring valuable expertise to the company's leadership team.

news.headline: Ohmium partners with SwitcH2 BV and BW Offshore for 300MW floating green ammonia plant.
news.summary: A company specializing in green hydrogen, Ohmium International, based in Newark, Calif. and Rotterdam, Netherlands, unveiled a recent partnership agreement. They have signed a Term Sheet with SwitcH2 BV, a renewable energy Joint Venture inclusive of partners like BW Offshore. As per the deal, Ohmium will be crafting Proton Exchange Membrane (PEM) electrolyzer solutions for a groundbreaking project involving a 300MW offshore floating setup. This collaboration marks a significant step towards advancing sustainable energy solutions.

news.headline: Aurora Mobile presented GPTBots and EngageLab at eCommerce Expo Asia, garnering attention from industry leaders; held on October 9-10, 2024, in Singapore.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Singapore, Aurora Mobile Limited (Nasdaq: JG) presented their no-code AI Bot development platform, GPTBots, and global customer engagement platform, EngageLab, at eCommerce Expo Asia during Tech Week Singapore. The event took place on October 9-10, 2024, at the Marina Bay Sands Expo & Convention Centre, featuring key players such as Shopify, Amazon, Stripe, and TikTok. The focus was on current trends in e-commerce, AI, and MarTech, and attendees showed great interest in Aurora Mobile's solutions.

Hisense Group Chairman announced Dual Carbon Pledge at ESG conference, emphasizing Green Development.
news.summary: In Qingdao, China, on October 17, 2024, Chairman of Hisense Group, Mr. Jia Shaoqian, revealed the company's Dual Carbon Pledge. He detailed Hisense's commitment to Green Development as a key aspect in achieving long-term success during the 2024 Environmental conference.

New Oriental Education & Tech Group will hold annual general meeting on Nov 25, 2024 in Beijing. (NYE: EDU, SEHK: 9901)
news.summary: A China-based company, New Oriental Education & Technology Group Inc., which offers private educational services, revealed plans to convene its yearly shareholder meeting at location No. 6. The meeting is scheduled to take place on Oct. 17, 2024, and will be open to all shareholders of the company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol EDU and SEHK under the ticker symbol 9901.

news.headline: Exotec gains ISO 27001:2022 certification for cybersecurity, emphasizing commitment to information security.
news.summary: Exotec showcased its strong cybersecurity measures and comprehensive approach to protecting customers from potential threats in Atlanta on October 17, 2024. The global warehouse robotics provider, announced that it has implemented international security standards to safeguard its operations. This emphasizes Exotec's commitment to ensuring the protection of its customers' data.

news.headline: Exyte unveils Exentec for Technology & Services: unites subsidiaries under clear brand identity with focus on excellence.
news.summary: Exentec has brought together Exyte's worldwide Technology & Services subsidiaries and sub brands under a new brand identity. The new branding aims to offer a distinct, pertinent, and trustworthy positioning for clients and stakeholders. The name Exentec is a fusion of excellence, expertise, and experience, emphasizing innovative technology. The CEO of Exyte expressed excitement about this development.

news.headline: AAM sells commercial vehicle axle business in India; This includes AAM India Manufacturing Corp Pvt. Ltd.
news.summary: Detroit-based American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (AAM) revealed on October 17, 2024, that it is finalizing a deal to offload its commercial vehicle axle division and associated assets in India. The sale involves AAM India Manufacturing Corporation Pvt., Ltd. (NYSE: AXL).

news.headline: Bitcoin's rally defies election concerns, with analysts predicting $70K milestone soon. $57M Bitcoin shorts liquidated, impacting 56K traders.
news.summary: Bitcoin has once again made headlines with a noticeable surge in its value, defying concerns surrounding the election. Analysts are predicting a potential increase to $70,000 in the near future. The cryptocurrency market saw a significant rally this week, with Bitcoin rising by almost 6.5%. This surge led to the liquidation of over $57 million in Bitcoin shorts within just 24 hours, affecting more than 56,000 traders. The unexpected spike in Bitcoin's value caught short traders by surprise, resulting in widespread liquidations. The rally is believed to be influenced by technical, political, and market factors.

news.headline: Borr Drilling Limited approved a senior unsecured convertible bond loan 2023/2028. Details from Hamilton, Bermuda on 17th Oct 2024.
news.summary: Today in Hamilton, Bermuda, Borr Drilling Limited received notification from Nordic Trustee AS regarding the summons for a written resolution dated October 2, 2024, for the Company's senior unsecured convertible bonds with ISIN NO0012828187. The resolution aims to address important decisions related to the company's financial obligations.

news.headline: Wialon announces 16 winners in 8 categories for best IoT projects worldwide in 2024. Grand Prix awards included.
news.summary: In various categories, sixteen outstanding winners have been revealed for their exceptional implementation of top IoT projects on a global scale in the last year. These winners also include recipients of prestigious Grand Prix awards. The announcement took place in VILNIUS, Lithuania on October 17, 2024. Among the winners is Wialon, a prominent IoT and fleet management platform renowned globally for its innovative solutions.

news.headline: Armenian reporter Gayane Aleksanyan visits Yichun City in Jiangxi Province to explore Chinese culture and join Mid-Autumn Festival celebrations.
news.summary: A journalist named Gayane Aleksanyan from NEWS.am in Armenia visited Yichun City located in Jiangxi Province, eastern China, to immerse in traditional Chinese customs and join in the festivities of the Mid-Autumn Festival. This visit is significant as it is her inaugural experience in the region.

news.headline: atNorth adds 3 new hires to development team, key part of rapid Nordic expansion. Leading colocation provider.
news.summary: As part of its swift Nordic expansion strategy, it is vital for the business to bolster its development team. In an announcement from REYKJAVÍK, Iceland on October 17, 2024, atNorth, the top provider of colocation, high-performance computing, and artificial intelligence services in the Nordic region, has disclosed their plan to strengthen their team.

Sunlands Technology Group's AGM on Dec 10, 2024, Beijing, discusses shareholders' concerns virtually as well.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Sunlands Technology Group (NYSE: STG) declared that its annual general meeting of shareholders (AGM) will be held on December 10, 2024, at 3:00 pm in Beijing. The meeting will take place at 7th Floor Building 6, Chaolai Science Park, No. 36 Chuangyuan Road, Chaoyang District, Beijing, China, and virtually via telephone at + (10) 5808 - 4288. There will be no proposals or resolutions up for approval or voting during the AGM. Instead, it will operate as an open platform for shareholders and American depositary shares (ADSs) holders to engage in discussions with the management.
